title: Nuovva Enamelled Cast Iron Dutch Oven Pot with Lid – 5 Quart Casserole Dish – Ceramic Dutch Oven for Bread Baking, Roasting, Braising & Stews – Oven Safe up to 500°F – 24cm Orange
features: Low Maintenance – A great alternative to the traditional bare cast iron pot with lid, this ceramic dutch oven is coated with enamel for a sleek, smooth finish. Enjoy quick and easy cleaning with no seasoning required—perfect for everyday use.

Personalise Your Kitchen– Available in vibrant red, blue, grey, and green, this dutch oven pot with lid adds a splash of colour to your cookware. Match it to your kitchen’s aesthetic or coordinate with existing iron pots for cooking.

Versatile Use – With excellent heat retention, this dutch oven for bread baking (and more!) can go from hob to oven with ease. Sear meats on the stovetop, then slow cook in the oven. Also ideal for casseroles, stews, and frying.

Classic Design – Designed for function and charm, this large dutch oven pot with lid features robust handles and a tight-fitting lid for hassle-free transfers and table presentation. Bring a rustic, home-cooked feel to any meal.
Thoughtful Gift – Whether you’re gifting a budding home chef or a seasoned cook, this stylish Dutch oven makes an impressive and lasting present for birthdays, weddings, and housewarmings alike.

Whether for professional use or home cooking, our premium quality cast iron enamelled pot is a must in every kitchen. The non-stick NUOVVA pot will surprise you with its versatility and functionality, Being ideal for searing, sauteing, simmering, braising, baking, roasting and frying. 100% PFOA-free Enemelled coating Our enamelled ceramic surface ensures a safe, chemical-free culinary experience. This Natural coating prevents harmful PFOA release and promotes better cooking by eliminating the risk of toxic fumes during high-temperature use. Natrually Non-Stick This Nuovva Dutch Oven Features a naturally non-stick surface, owing to its high-quality enamelled coating, which provides easy food release and hassle-free cleaning.
